title: CarPlan Flash Dash Cockpit Shine - Satin Finish Citrus, 500 ml & Original Black - Trim and Bumper Shine, 500 ml
features: Product 1: 500 ml bottle of Satin Finish Citrus-scented dashboard cleaner
Product 1: Quickly and easily removes dirt and grime from dashboard and other plastic surfaces
Product 1: Protects against drying, cracking and fading
Product 1: Foam cleaning technology providing protection against dirt and grime build up
Product 2: Just spray on and wipe off to restore the new look to all PVC trim, plastic bumpers, tyre walls, side mirrors and spoiler kits
Product 2: Contains an anti-static cleaning agent designed to resist dirt, grease and give a longer lasting shine
Product 2: Cleans and protects; Use on all colours of plastic trim
Product 2: Shake can well Spray directly onto surface and leave to dry
description: From the manufacturer CarPlan Flash Dash Cockpit Shine - Satin Finish Citrus, 500 ml CarPlan Flash Dash Satin Cleaner is a powerful and versatile cleaning solution for your car's dashboard and interior. This 500 ml bottle of cleaner is specially formulated to remove dirt, grime, and other stubborn stains from your dashboard and other satin surfaces. The unique formula is safe for use on all types of surfaces, including plastic, vinyl, and metal, and leaves a long-lasting satin finish. It's easy to use, simply spray on and wipe off, it will leave your car's interior looking like new. This product is specially designed to clean and maintain the shine of your car's dashboard and other satin surfaces, leaving a fresh and clean smell. Perfect for maintaining the appearance of your car. Brand Carplan Item Form Foam Scent Citrus Material Feature Scented Item Volume 500.0 Milliliters CarPlan Original Black - Trim & Bumper Shine, 500 ml Original Black restores a 'new look' shine on all PVC trim, plastic bumpers of all colours, side mirrors and even tyre side walls. Brand Carplan Color Black Size 500 Ml Eu Spare Part Availability Duration 1.0 Years
